sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الصَّحْرَاءُ حَارَّةً وَكَانَ مُسَافِرٌ يَمْشِي وَحِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Pustinja je bila vruća i jedan putnik je hodao sam.
sentences.translationEn: The desert was hot and a traveler was walking alone.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَبْقَ عِنْدَهُ مَاءٌ وَشَعَرَ بِالْعَطَشِ الشَّدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Nije mu ostalo vode i osjetio je jaku žeđ.
sentences.translationEn: He had no water left and felt very thirsty.

sentences.arabic: فَجَأَةً رَأَى خَيْمَةً بَعِيدَةً وَمَشَى نَحْوَهَا بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odjednom je ugledao daleki šator i brzo je krenuo prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: Suddenly he saw a distant tent and walked quickly toward it.

sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْخَيْمَةِ وَأَعْطَاهُ مَاءً وَطَعَامًا.
sentences.translation: Iz šatora je izašao čovjek i dao mu je vodu i hranu.
sentences.translationEn: A man came out of the tent and gave him water and food.

sentences.translation: Putnik mu se zahvalio od sveg srca.
sentences.translationEn: The traveler thanked him with all his heart.
